title: lepidium flexuosum
intro: Lepidium flexuosum, also known as flexible peppergrass, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Lepidium flexuosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its health benefits.
